quality_note: Exceptional ambassador response — one of the most detailed across all colleges.

facts: IIT Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.
24/7 WiFi throughout campus. Every hostel room has LAN wire.
ACs work during summer nights in hostels.
All classrooms have central AC.
A pantry with refrigerator, electric stove, oven, and water dispenser is available on every floor in hostels.
You can go out of campus whenever you want — no curfew.
Inter-hostel mobility — boys and girls allowed to visit opposite gender hostels with consent.
Classroom booking available via Google Calendar during exam times.
Large library (9 AM - 12 AM) and mini library (24/7) with website to check book availability.

sharing.current_policy: 1st year (BTech + MTech) — double (2 per room). 2nd and 3rd year — triple (3 per room). 4th year, MTech 2nd year, some PhD — single room.
sharing.note: Changed from previous years. Previously 1st/2nd got triple and 3rd/4th got single. Administration decides sharing for each batch.

hostels_boys.allotment: Students fill hostel allocation form at start of each academic year. Allocated on first come first serve basis.
hostels_boys.married_phd: PhD students who are married/with family get housing blocks within campus.

hostels_girls.sharing: 1st, 2nd, 3rd year — double rooms (2 per room). 4th year, MTech, some PhD — single rooms.

mess.allotment: Allocated through Google form, first come first serve. Form floated every half semester — students can change mess every half sem.
mess.first_year: 1st year students: each mess allocated for 2 weeks, then they can choose via Google form.

notes: Full tuition remission for income below Rs 1 lakh.
2/3rd tuition remission for income Rs 1-5 lakh.
Revised tuition of Rs 1,00,000 applicable from July 2022 batch onwards.

facts: 24/7 WiFi throughout campus.
Every hostel room has a LAN wire to connect.
All classrooms have central AC.
80% attendance mandatory in Foundation Programme and Physical Education in 1st year.
50% attendance mandatory in 2nd year PE.
For all other courses, attendance policy changes from course to course and depends completely on the professor.
Can be 0% attendance or 50% or 80% — whatever the professor decides.
If majority of students feel attendance policy is unfair (like 100%), they can negotiate with the professor.

events: Open mic events at Panchayat (hostel area center)

sports_events.name: Hallabol
sports_events.desc: Sports with fun rules. Everyone can participate — students, staff, faculty.

sports_events.name: General Championship
sports_events.desc: Batch-wise competition. BTech 1st-4th, Masters, PhDs compete. Highest cumulative points wins.

facilities: 2 Badminton halls with 3 courts each + 4 separate courts in hostel area

hostel_area: 2 Pure Veg Stalls (coffee, shakes, sandwiches, vadapav, pizza, toasts)
canteen.note: Temporary trial stalls appear regularly at hostel area.

facts: Common Laundry — contracted service, takes laundry bags twice a week. Schedule depends on hostel.
3 Smart Laundry machines in Student Lounge — online booking system.
Safety Laundry — drop off clothes, pay per item, pick up after specified days.

posts: Secretaries: General, Welfare, Sports, Academic, Cultural (for whole IITGN community)
Senators: 4 from every batch (BTech 1st-4th, whole MTech) + 1 girl senator for whole community
elections.process: Election commission conducts elections. Secretary candidates can have campaigners from each batch.

fines.policy: No fines policy unless you break campus property.
fines.disciplinary: SSAC (disciplinary committee) handles issues. Punishments include: social hours (charity work), semester back, year back, removing from hostel (stay off campus).
fines.offenses: Property damage, cheating, causing problems to others.

facts: Apollo Pharmacy on campus.
Ambulance services available.
Medical center at central arcade — 24/7.
Daily availability of gynecologist, physician, physiotherapist etc.
Daily email sent to all students with doctor availability and timings.
Serious cases referred to outside hospitals — all expenses reimbursed on submitting bills.
Mental health services available — can talk anytime when stressed.
Free buses from campus to Kudasan daily at specific times.
Free buses to railway station and airport during vacations.
Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport — 16 km.
Sabarmati Railway Station (Gandhinagar) — 18 km.
Ahmedabad Junction — 22 km.
2 fast-food restaurants that deliver only to campus — order via WhatsApp.
Zomato available.
Bigbasket available.
Kudasan area (5-6 km from campus) has almost any kind of restaurant.

language_climate.language: On campus English works well, most prefer Hindi. Outside campus Hindi works. Professors use English. Staff speaks Hindi.
language_climate.climate: Winters 8-25°C, Summers 25-40°C. Very humid — sometimes low temperature feels hot. Winters can feel very cold too.

academics.curriculum: UG Curriculum has Institute Level Plan. 1st sem: Foundation Programme, Intro to Writing, World Civilizations, Calculus, Engineering Graphics, Computing, Design Innovation & Prototyping, Materials for Future, PE. 2nd sem: General Education, Writing II, Differential Equations, Undergrad Science Lab, Data Centric Computing, Probability & Statistics, Electrical Engineering, World of Engineering, PE. Branch-specific courses start from 3rd semester. Students can choose Sci/Math baskets and electives from a given list.
academics.credits: 28 credits in 1st sem, 22 in 2nd sem, reducing to 8-10 in later semesters as electives increase.
